text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 278 

TP_COPAY_PD_AMT 

LABEL: Third-Party Copayment Paid Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount the third party paid toward the copayment amount. 

SHORT NAME: TP_COPAY_PD_AMT 

LONG NAME: TP_COPAY_PD_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76)
